item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.2","is_repeated_local_repair":false,"same_means_type":false,"prior_repair_count":0,"is_n_plus_1_request":false,"is_bounded_emergency_exception_request":false,"emergency_constraint_present":false,"repeated_bypass_unresolved":false,"post_exception_closure_required":false,"pressure_present":false,"confidence":0.97,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"这月有三起投诉：配送迟到、包装破损、客服回访慢。"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"现在要写复盘，请帮我找主因和责任边界。"}],"abstain_reason":"Only one current request is provided, with no prior local repair history or same-class recurrence after failed patches."}
